# Colette Residences

1880 Brickell Ave Miami FL 33129

## Colette Residences – Boutique Luxury Living in South Brickell

Colette Residences is a pre-construction boutique luxury condominium development rising in South Brickell at 1880 Brickell Avenue, offering just 38 private residences across five stories with an expected completion in 2028. Thoughtfully conceived as an ultra-limited ownership opportunity, Colette introduces an intimate residential experience defined by architectural refinement, privacy, and modern serenity. Developed by Meta Development and designed by award-winning studio OSPA, the building blends sculptural contemporary design with warm, natural materials, setting a new standard for boutique living in one of Miami’s most desirable residential enclaves.

## Colette Floor Plans

Colette features only 38 residences across multiple distinct collections: Garden Residences, Terrace Residences, Colette Residences (levels 2–5), and two crown Penthouses measuring 5,916 and 6,128 square feet, each with a private rooftop pool, summer kitchen, and expansive entertainment terrace. [Colette Residences floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Colette-floor-plans.pdf "Colette floor plans") range from 2 to 4 bedrooms, offering expansive interiors between 2,144 and 3,180 square feet, along with extensive outdoor terraces that enhance seamless indoor-outdoor living. Every residence features floor-to-ceiling impact-resistant glass, 10’6″ ceilings, direct password-protected elevator entry, Miele appliance packages, 78-bottle wine coolers, mineral-based INALCO countertops, custom Italian millwork by CESAR and LEMA, and PORCELANOSA large-format flooring throughout. Prices start from $3.3 million, positioning Colette among South Brickell’s premier new-construction offerings.

## Amenities & Boutique Wellness Lifestyle

Despite its boutique scale, Colette offers over 15,000 square feet of curated amenities, an extremely rare amenity-to-residence ratio in Brickell. Wellness experiences include a TECHNOGYM fitness center extending to a tranquil outdoor wellness deck, spa with jacuzzi, sauna, and massage room, screening room, children’s playroom, meeting space, and elegant indoor and outdoor lounges with catering kitchen, barbecue and entertaining zones. At the rooftop, residents enjoy a 50-foot resort-style pool, private cabanas, and a 5,200-square-foot sun deck, found only in ultra-luxury, limited-residency buildings. Additional luxury services include 24/7 concierge, advanced access control and surveillance, covered self-parking with EV charging, optional full-service valet, and private storage for every residence.

## Colette Brickell Location

Colette Residences is located at 1880 Brickell Avenue, in the discreet and highly sought-after South [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell") residential corridor. Known for its quiet, tree-lined ambiance, waterfront parks, and proximity to the city’s finest cultural and lifestyle destinations, this position offers the perfect balance between serenity and connectivity. Residents are minutes from The Underline, Brickell City Centre, Mary Brickell Village, Coconut Grove, Rickenbacker Causeway, and Key Biscayne beaches, along with top private schools, gourmet markets, marinas, and fine dining. With such proximity while remaining outside the urban noise of central Brickell, Colette Residences delivers an exceptionally rare residential proposition: connected, private, and timeless.

[**Colette Fact Sheet**](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Colette-Residences-Fact-Sheet-English.pdf "Colette Fact Sheet")

[**Colette Brochure**](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Colette-Residences-Sales-Presentation-English.pdf "Colette Brochure")

## Amenities

- A double-height lobby welcomes residents with natural light, elegant scale, and lush greenery.
- Thoughtfully designed spaces include a screening room, children’s playroom, and meeting room.
- A TECHNOGYM fitness center extends outdoors to a tranquil area ideal for yoga, stretching, and relaxation, embraced by panoramic views of the city and bay.
- The spa includes wellness areas with a jacuzzi, a sauna, and a massage room, offering a relaxing and restorative experience.
- An intimate indoor lounge with a catering kitchen offers an elegant setting for private dinners and events.
- The outdoor lounge invites open-air gatherings with a kitchen and barbecue area.
- On top of the building, the 50-foot pool is complemented by private cabanas and a sprawling 5,200 SF sun deck.
- Beyond the rooftop pool, more than 15,000 SF of common areas provide versatile amenities, a rare privilege for just 38 residences.

Read more

![](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/themes/mci/assets/img/layer2.png)

## Features

- Kitchens feature custom Italian millwork by CESAR, extending to bathrooms and laundry rooms, all finished with fingerprint-resistant surfaces.
- Kitchens and laundry areas feature KOHLER and BLANCO fixtures, uniting precision craftsmanship with enduring performance.
- Tailor-made mineral-based countertops from INALCO add both durability and refined aesthetics across kitchens, bathrooms, and laundry rooms.
- Bespoke Italian millwork by LEMA elevates the walk-in closets, combining exceptional craftsmanship with timeless elegance.
- Crafted by PORCELANOSA, the large-format, mineral-based flooring merges cutting-edge performance with elegant, sustainable design.
- Thoughtfully designed for modern living, residences feature integrated recessed lighting and refined bathroom sconces.
- Bathrooms are appointed with Graff matte-black fittings, Victoria & Albert freestanding bathtubs, and Duravit wall-hung toilets — a curated selection that embodies contemporary elegance and timeless quality.

**The Garden Residences**

- 3 BR
- 4 Residences, Ground Floor
- 2,166 - 2,358 SF

Four distinctive residences with private gardens, outdoor kitchens, and spas—offering the intimacy and comfort of a private home, combined with the services and amenities of a boutique building.

**The Colette Residences**

- 2 BR, 3 BR & 4 BR
- 28 Residences, 2nd to 5th floors
- 2,210 - 3,184 SF

This ensemble of residences offers a selection of two-, three-, and four-bedroom homes, each thoughtfully designed with generous layouts and seamless indoor–outdoor connection.

**The Terrace Residences**

- 2 BR & 3 BR
- 4 Residences, 1st Floor
- 2,143 SF

A limited collection of residences offers expanded terraces that flow effortlessly from the interiors, creating rare open-air living in the heart of South Brickell—perfect for entertaining or a quiet retreat.

**The Penthouses at Colette**

- 4 BR + Office + Family Room
- 2 Residences, 5th Floor
- 5,916 and 6,128 SF

At the crown of the building, two exclusive penthouses each offer four bedrooms, a family room, office, and pantry. Designed for the most refined lifestyles, these residences open to private rooftops with summer kitchens and pools—creating rare sanctuaries for entertaining, relaxing, and taking in panoramic views of Miami.

Read more

# Colette Brickell

### **Brickell / 2028**

38 Residences of
3 to 4 Bedrooms

**1880 Brickell Ave, Miami, FL 33129, USA**

Discover **Colette Brickell**, an exclusive five-story boutique residence at 1880 Brickell Avenue. Offering only 38 luxury condos from $3.3 M, with spacious 3- & 4-bedroom layouts, rooftop pool, gym, and children’s playroom — crafted by Meta Development and OSPA Design in Miami’s most elegant neighborhood. This project is not officially launched yet, information is subject to change.

[7 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/colettebrickell/#ForSale) from $2,790,000 to $5,195,140

Average Listing: $1,727 x SF ($18,588 x M2)
